title: Elior India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Elior India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Elior India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Guest Relations Manager to join our dynamic team in Noida. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Elior India:
Elior India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Elior India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
